data.title: 国际服特别OST「Art is Now」
data.summary: [Wild Hunt Academy Special OST – ‘Art is Now’ MV Out Now!] Sensei! The Wild Hunt Academy special OST
data.body:
[Wild Hunt Academy Special OST – ‘Art is Now’ MV Out Now!]

Sensei! The Wild Hunt Academy special OST, ‘Art is Now’ MV has just been released! Step into the moment where art begins~

➡️ Watch here: https://youtu.be/S7vWEqSUjds
